review_criteria: Verify that V0.8.5 explicitly focuses on implementing the Serverless, Git-Driven Headless Worktree and Clean Uninstall features (Context Spoofing).
Verify that the milestone map is correctly structured into 4 logical phases (Uninstall, Manager, Proxy, Docs) to ensure a safe, incremental implementation of the Node.js MCP core.
Verify NO implementation code (e.g., modifying src/ or bin/) or active state model semantic changes (modifying workflow/dispatch.json) occurred during this kickoff planning phase.
